name: Milloy, Ross

evidence: Ross Milloy has been president of the Austin–San Antonio Corridor Council — a regional nonprofit public/private partnership of 130+ jurisdictions, authorities and businesses — since 1994, matching the filing's title and employer exactly; the council's office address appears in Austin city campaign-finance filings. He helped pass the legislation creating the Austin–San Antonio Commuter Rail District and secured $57.6M in federal planning funds; previously a New York Times writer and Texas House/Senate staffer.
